title: OpenAPI Path Item Object
description: Describes the operations available on a single path. A Path Item may be empty due to ACL constraints.

$ref.description: Allows for a referenced definition of this path item.

summary.description: An optional string summary intended to apply to all operations in this path.

description.description: An optional string description intended to apply to all operations in this path.

servers.description: Alternative servers to service all operations in this path.

parameters.description: A list of parameters applicable for all operations described under this path.
